chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1385 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.8740/2018 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of CMA No.8741/2018 (1 Rule 10) 4. For hearing of main case 03.12.2024 Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kuber, Assistant AG Sindh along with Assistant Executive Engineer Bund Sub-Division, Gambat/respondent No.4 >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the petitioner. Perusal of file reveals that petitioner was posted before this Court on 02.03.2021 when learned counsel for the petitioner sought time. Right from 02.03.2021 neither petitioner nor Counsel have took efforts to pursue it by filing any application. Such lethargic attitude on their part shows either purpose for which this petition was filed has been served or petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the matter, therefore, he as well his Counsel have chosen to remain absent, instead of pursuing it vigilantly. We have also gone through the averments as well as prayer clause and find that it is also not maintainable. Consequently and in view of the above, instant Constitutional Petition is hereby dismissed in default along with pending applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
